originalTitle: Private Asset Manager Hamilton Lane Rebuts Its Industry’s Critics
summary: Hamilton Lane says critics misunderstand how private-equity fund stakes are valued, defending the industry’s practice of booking gains on discounted secondary-market purchases.
content: Hamilton Lane says critics misunderstand how private-equity fund stakes are valued, defending the industry’s practice of booking gains on discounted secondary-market purchases.
chineseTitle: 私人资产管理公司 Hamilton Lane 反驳其行业批评者
chineseSummary: 汉密尔顿·莱恩表示，批评者误解了私募股权基金股权的估值方式，并为该行业在二级市场折扣购买中记入收益的做法辩护。
chineseContent: 汉密尔顿·莱恩表示，批评者误解了私募股权基金股权的估值方式，并为该行业在二级市场折扣购买中记入收益的做法辩护。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
